creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 146275
update to 3.3.13 plus rework

The patch adopts the update to 3.3.12

Additional:
 - heavy lifted Makefile (where possible)
 - add hints with url's to bugs into Makefile
 - fix pkg-plist
 - remove FS_COSS from OPTIONS_DEFINE
 - patches to not install *.conf$ files (remove install instructions from Makefile.in)

PS:
I've tried OPTIONS_EXCLUDE for ECAP, but OPSYS is unknown before bsd.port.options.mk and after the include this instruction is useless, so pick up the BROKEN message.

Please cross test on FreeBSD 10+ and current
